tasks.label: build-solution
args: $msbuild = & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe' -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; if (!$msbuild) { Write-Error 'MSBuild not found'; exit 1 }; & $msbuild 'Bulk Solution Exporter.sln' /p:Configuration=Debug; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Copy-Item 'Bulk Solution Exporter\bin\Debug\Plugins\Com.AiricLenz.XTB.Plugin.BulkSolutionExporter.dll' "$env:APPDATA\MscrmTools\XrmToolBox\Plugins\Com.AiricLenz.XTB.Plugin.BulkSolutionExporter.dll" -Force }
